name: com.rolandkaechele.titlescreenmanager
description: Orchestrates the title screen: main menu panel navigation, new/continue/load game flow, unlockable gallery (artworks, cutscenes, music, collectibles), options (audio, language, graphics, fullscreen) persisted via PlayerPrefs, credits, and extras. Optional SaveManager, MapLoaderFramework, EventManager, and Unity Localization bridges.
